update-7-0-0-move-to-inference.description: Remove hard-written serve/deploy/next-build executor targets (now inferred) and register @naxodev/nx-cloudflare/plugin in nx.json.

update-7-0-0-drop-nextjs.description: Guide removal of the dropped Next.js + webpack integration (next-build executor, with-nx/compose-plugins) for projects that still reference it.

update-7-0-0-application-aliases.description: Note that the application generator now aliases create-cloudflare (C3); existing projects are unaffected, but scripted invocations should move to the new schema.
